Title: Browse account portfolio
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want a portfolio view of all accounts
So that I can choose which account to inspect

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Portfolio cards render when no current account is selected.
- [ ] Clicking a card opens that account detail view.
- [ ] Archived accounts remain visible but are visually separated or dimmed.

Notes: Portfolio behavior was refined across Apr 16-20 commits.
